commands: PYTEST_DISABLE_PLUGIN_AUTOLOAD=1 python -m pytest tests/test_author_persist.py tests/test_author_cli.py -v -p no:debugging -p no:cacheprovider --basetemp .pytest-tmp
last_tests_run.result: 10 passed in 3.94s; compile_check OK (81 files); import ok; --help verified

toolchain_notes: Python 3.14 + anyio plugin autoload + Windows = OSError [WinError 10106] at asyncio backend init. Workaround: PYTEST_DISABLE_PLUGIN_AUTOLOAD=1 + explicit -p no:debugging -p no:cacheprovider. Separate follow-up slice should pin pytest plugins or add pyproject.toml pytest config.

crewAI 1.14.2 cannot install on Python 3.14 — pydantic-core/pyo3 hard-caps at Python 3.13. crewAI env must always use Python 3.12 venv at C:\Users\larsv\envs\crewai-env. Do not attempt crewai pip install under Python 3.14.
smoke_crewai.py mcp.__version__ AttributeError is benign — mcp IS installed (crewAI bundled mcp~=1.26.0) but does not expose __version__. Smoke test is otherwise green.

crewai_env.smoke_test: passed (mcp.__version__ AttributeError is benign — mcp is installed)

upstream_fork_model.principle: Use upstream repos as intended by GitHub. Slim seams, replaceable adapters, minimum integration.

reactive_resume.role: GUI/editor for structured resumes + JSON interchange surface
reactive_resume.canonical_ownership: stays in JobPipe (evidence selection, claim targeting, narrative constraints)

jobsync.canonical_ownership: stays in JobPipe (job evaluation state, claims, selection logic)

crewai.role: agent runtime for cooperative author/revise loop on cover letters + CV tailoring
crewai.integration: isolated — jobpipe_crewai/ sibling module, AuthorAdapter Protocol seam, JSON in/out only
crewai.status: Sprint 3 in progress — S9 env done, S10-S12 handed to Codex
crewai.canonical_ownership: stays in JobPipe — contracts (AuthoringCaseContext, GeneratedApplicationPackage, DocumentValidationResult) are JobPipe-native and agent-runtime-swappable

authoring_mvp_lane.name: T002: AI document authoring MVP (cover letter + tailored CV)
authoring_mvp_lane.position_decision_notes: Option C (hybrid): deterministic contracts + validation stay JobPipe-native. crewAI enters only inside the author/revise agent layer. Data is the product, the engine is JobPipe, agent frameworks are pluggable.

contracts.AuthoringCaseContext: immutable frozen dataclass - candidate + job + evidence bundle going into author
contracts.GeneratedApplicationPackage: pydantic model - cover_letter_draft + tailored_cv_projection + evidence_refs + gap_notes + validation
contracts.DocumentValidationResult: pydantic model - passed + score + failures + warnings

linkedin_scrape.notes: Possible via MCP + crewAI browser agent

intake_pipeline.dedup: multi-level: within-run, against primary DB, cross-source by job_id/URL
intake_pipeline.suggested_by_platform_semantics: true = bypasses semantic pre-filter (platform already ran candidate-profile match); false = full pipeline

status_scan.description: Scans ATS confirmation emails, classifies applied/interview/rejected, fuzzy-matches to canonical job, writes JobSyncApplicationStatusEvent to DB. Only upgrades status. Closes write-back loop automatically.

suggestions_scan.description: Extracts job URLs from FINN digest and LinkedIn recommendation emails, dedupes, queues with suggested_by_platform=true

coordinator_leverage_scaffolding.purpose: One-time Opus work so Sonnet planner + Codex implementer can run cheap and stable without coordinator re-routing per slice.
